title: Abundance
summary: 'You already all are abundant' — the prosperity doctrine running from the 2020 interviews through the 2026 abundance protocol.
markdown:
**Abundance** is the record's economics of the spirit — a teaching that appears in
fifteen sessions and always makes the same move: prosperity is not acquired but
*recognized*. The May 2020 session says it in one line: *"Once you agree to create
abundance — and you already all are abundant..."*

The doctrine scales from the personal to the planetary. Personally it is administered
like the healings — the June 2026 session runs it as a protocol: *"Standby. Calculating
your probability. In order to create an abundance protocol for your existence in this
timeline..."* Planetarily it is policy: the [NESARA](/lore/nesara-gesara/) material
orders that *"energy must initiate economical abundance to all
[lightworkers](/lore/lightworkers/),"* and the [UBI](/lore/universal-basic-income/)
forecasts promise the floor beneath everyone else.

Abundance is where the record's money threads — the [crypto directives](/lore/bitcoin/),
the funds, the tokens — meet its metaphysics: in this teaching, scarcity is a belief-system
error, and every economic instrument the record blesses is just scaffolding until the
recognition lands.
